goal: Move the existing Feishu benben production app consumption from the old OpenClaw gateway to the new openclaw-benben vNext instance without creating a new Feishu app.
untouched_live_items: Telegram and QQBot enablement on openclaw-benben

verification.shadow_feishu_log: Feishu websocket client started and ws client ready
verification.old_feishu_log_after_restart: no old Feishu start observed after old restart

steps: Restore old openclaw.json, gateway.env, and 80-config-guard.conf from the old backup dir.
Restore shadow openclaw.json and shadow.env from the new backup dir.
Verify old Feishu channel/plugin true, shadow Feishu channel/plugin false, and both health endpoints.

residual_risks: A controlled real Feishu user-message proof was not sent by Codex because production message sending remains a high-risk action that should be operator-controlled.
openclaw-benben still uses port 18792 and the existing service name rather than replacing the old service unit name; old service remains rollback anchor.
openclaw-benben environment metadata still contains shadow-oriented service kind/marker labels, though production channel guard is set to 0.
